data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts data in transit and at rest to protect user information.
data.technical_spec: Uses TLS for data transmission and AES for data storage.

data.title: Web Application Firewall
data.description: Protects against threats such as SQL injection or XSS.

data.title: Multi-Factor Authentication
data.description: Requires multiple forms of verification to access sensitive areas.
data.technical_spec: Supports software and hardware token generation.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Mitigates distributed denial of service attacks.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts periodic reviews to ensure security compliance.
data.technical_spec: Automated tools alongside manual expert reviews.
